title: (Bee's) Fine Armory
description: My retextures of tools, weapons, and armour sets
body: ### About 🏹 This small pack reworks vanilla tools, weapons, and armour! Its aim isn't a complete stylistic redo, but a touching up where I felt it was needed. Armour suits did need a bit more imagination though, but I think they now look quite stylish! That is it. Feel free to look at the gallery for screenshots. I hope you like it. ### Compatibility You might receive an in-game "made for a newer version of Minecraft" warning if you're not playing on the latest version. You can freely ignore it if you're playing on a version the resource pack file is tagged with. ### Collections Here are my other packs that go well with this one! - [My **Vanilla+ Collections**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillacollections) ∗ a pack of extensive texture improvements, from grass to resources - [**Fancy Crops**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) ∗ my take on prettier crop farming with new variable textures and models - [**Serified Font**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/serified-font) ∗ my take on a much fancier font - [**Fluffy Carpets and Wool**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fluffy-carpets) ∗ my take on much fluffier wool and carpets (currently unavailable on Modrinth) - [**Cosier Beds**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cozier-beds) ∗ my take on prettier and cosier bed models (currently unavailable on Modrinth) - [**Banner Pattern Clarity**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/banner-pattern-clarity) ∗ provides distinctive (and pretty) banner pattern item textures - [**Blockier Goat Horn**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockier-goat-horn) ∗ gives the goat horn a silly model in your hand I also make all kinds of data packs, like [**Geophilic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic), the vanilla biome overhaul pack! You should visit my profile to see them all! You can also visit my [**website**](https://everloste.github.io/) to see everything I do, join my [**Discord community**](https://everloste.github.io/discord), or give me a small tip on [**Ko-fi**](https://everloste.github.io/ko-fi). Thank you and have fun! <3
